summary: Comprehensive testing of SITI Intelligence new features: stream-batch endpoint, calibration overlay, kill-zone badge, static PDF imports, fuzzy column mapping, live stream toggle, 2x charts. 27/27 backend tests passed (100%). All new frontend features verified working.

minor.issue: @app.on_event('startup') is deprecated in newer FastAPI versions — should use lifespan context manager. No functional impact currently.

ui_bugs.issue: Console hydration warning: '<span> cannot be child of <tbody>'. IMPORTANT: This is caused by the Emergent visual editor injecting '<span data-ve-dynamic="true" x-excluded="true" style={{display:"contents"}}>' around dynamic array content in the preview environment. The actual FailureTable.jsx code is correct — .map() returns <tr> directly inside <tbody>. This warning does NOT appear in production builds. Not a code bug.

action_items: Optional: Migrate @app.on_event('startup') to FastAPI lifespan context manager (cosmetic, no functional impact)
FailureTable hydration warning is an Emergent editor preview artifact — no code change needed
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 475: @app.on_event('startup') deprecated in FastAPI 0.93+. Use: from contextlib import asynccontextmanager; @asynccontextmanager async def lifespan(app): ... yield
stream-batch endpoint resets Kalman (_kx = None) on every batch injection which causes discontinuous Kalman predictions. Consider preserving Kalman state across injections.
KillZoneBadge outer div has no color style set — inherits white from parent theme. Inner <span> correctly has color:#FF3B30. Visually correct.
MIMIKernel.warehouse_metrics() only iterates ['A','B','C','D','F'] — skips block 'E'. Minor completeness concern if uploaded CSVs contain block E.

verified_features.pdf_export: PASS — static jsPDF import works, 36KB PDF downloaded successfully
verified_features.bar_chart_height_280px: PASS — bar chart ResponsiveContainer is exactly 280px
verified_features.pie_chart_height_280px: PASS — pie chart ResponsiveContainer is exactly 280px
verified_features.kill_zone_badge: PASS — 'COLLAPSE THRESHOLD ρ=0.85' badge with dashed border in top-right of bar chart
verified_features.live_stream_start: PASS — button changes from 'INITIATE LIVE STREAM' to 'HALT STREAM' with green border
verified_features.live_stream_stop: PASS — button reverts to 'INITIATE LIVE STREAM' on second click
verified_features.stream_batch_endpoint: PASS — POST /api/kernel/stream-batch?n=100 returns success:true, n_total increases by 100, revenue increments
verified_features.catastrophe_banner: PASS — orange border (#FF9F0A) banner visible for rho=0.82 > 0.80
verified_features.collapse_screen_border_absent: PASS — .collapse-screen-border not in DOM for rho<0.85
verified_features.kpi_label_contrast: PASS — KPI labels are rgb(212,212,216) = #D4D4D8 (high contrast on dark bg)
verified_features.data_injection_3_columns: PASS — All 3 columns (Genius Reset, PDF Export, Live Telemetry Stream) present
verified_features.fuzzy_column_mapping: PASS — messy CSV headers (carrier_mode, cc_call, prod_tier etc.) auto-mapped correctly
verified_features.missing_values_fill: PASS — CSV with blank numeric cells fills with column means without error
verified_features.failure_table_direct_tr: PASS (code correct) — JSX map() is directly in <tbody>, Emergent editor adds span wrapper in preview only

seed_data_creation: Backend was restarted to reset kernel to original synthetic dataset (n=10999, rho~0.82) after backend tests uploaded small CSVs
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features from SYSTEM EMERGENCY overhaul verified working: PDF export (static jsPDF), stream-batch API, calibration overlay (triggered by CSV upload), kill-zone badge, 2x chart heights, white tooltips, live stream toggle, fuzzy column mapping. FailureTable hydration console error is Emergent editor preview artifact only — code is correct. Backend at rho~0.82 (catastrophe=true, collapse=false). Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_siti_iteration2.py
rca_of_issue: FailureTable hydration warning: The Emergent visual editor injects '<span data-ve-dynamic="true" x-excluded="true" style={display:contents}>' around every JSX .map() expression to enable live editing in the preview environment. This span is invalid as a direct child of <tbody>. The actual FailureTable.jsx code is structurally correct — in a production build without the Emergent editor overlay, this warning would not appear. RCA: Preview-environment-only editor instrumentation, not a code defect.
